repository.name: yakuphanycl/wrg-skills
repository.description: Claude Code skills authored alongside the WinstonRedGuard monorepo: monorepo-audit, memory-check, wrg-devguard-paste-lint

publisher.name: yakuphanycl
publisher.context: Author of the WinstonRedGuard monorepo (https://github.com/yakuphanycl/WinstonRedGuard); skills here are byproducts of that work.

skills.name: monorepo-audit
skills.summary: Audit a Python monorepo for SQLite schema drift, coverage-floor drift, and orphan modules. Read-only, fast, stdlib-only with optional tomli fallback.

skills.name: memory-check
skills.summary: Pause and audit the current conversation for friction patterns auto-memory might have missed. Surfaces correction patterns, repeated friction, and real-time mismatches as draft feedback memory entries with per-entry user approval.
triggers: what should I remember from this session

skills.name: wrg-devguard-paste-lint
skills.summary: Run wrg-devguard policy lint or secret scan against a pasted snippet. Useful for prompt-injection detection, AI safety review, and credential leak detection. Wraps the wrg-devguard PyPI package; no network calls.

install_notes.git_hygiene: Add /.agents/skills/ and /skills-lock.json to .gitignore if installing into a tracked repo with Project scope.
